customManagers.description: Git sources: '# renovate:' comment above url + tag. The commit hash is resolved by the post-renovate CI job.
Archive/file sources where the version occurs once in the URL, right before .tar.(gz|xz|bz2). The sha256 is refreshed by the post-renovate CI job.
Archive sources marked shape=double: the version occurs twice in the URL (directory and file name), so the whole url line is rebuilt.
matchStrings: (?<comment># renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>\S+)(?: packageName=(?<packageName>\S+))?(?: versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?(?: extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))?(?: registryUrl=(?<registryUrl>\S+))? shape=double)\n(?<indent> +)url: (?<prefix>\S+/v?)(?<currentValue>\d[\d.]*)(?<middle>/\S+[-/]v?)\d+\.[\d.]+(?<suffix>[-.]\S+)\n

customManagers.description: PyPI wheels: version bumped in the file name; the hashed URL path and sha256 are rewritten by the post-renovate CI job from the PyPI API.
7-Zip Linux binary: release tag 26.00 maps to file name 7z2600-linux-x64.tar.xz.
krb5 (shape=truncated-dir): the URL directory component is the version truncated to major.minor.
matchStrings: (?<comment># renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>\S+)(?: packageName=(?<packageName>\S+))?(?: versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?(?: extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))? shape=truncated-dir)\n(?<indent> +)url: https://kerberos\.org/dist/krb5/[\d.]+/krb5-(?<currentValue>[\d.]+)\.tar\.gz\n
